summary: Iteration 120: Tested ready_for_casting status bug fix. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: No 'Qualcosa è andato storto' error, pages load correctly, Coming Soon section displays properly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: scheduler_tasks.py now correctly sets status to 'ready_for_casting' for pre_casting films after Coming Soon timer expires. Frontend handles this status correctly in FilmPipeline.jsx. All pipeline endpoints working without 500 errors.

backend: GET /api/auth/login works with admin and test user credentials
GET /api/film-pipeline/counts includes ready_for_casting in proposed count
GET /api/film-pipeline/casting returns films in casting phase
GET /api/coming-soon returns list of coming soon items
frontend: Produci Film page loads without 'Qualcosa è andato storto' error
Coming Soon section (PROSSIMAMENTE) displays correctly with countdown timers

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Scheduler set films to 'completed' after Coming Soon timer expired, skipping casting/screenplay/production phases
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: scheduler_tasks.py auto_release_coming_soon now sets status to 'ready_for_casting' for pre_casting films
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - Backend tests pass, frontend loads without errors
